title: autobench.island.health v1
description: Per-island health snapshot emitted once per generation. Tracks plateau depth, population size, and time since last reset to enable adaptive island-management policies. Source: /autobench.

generation.description: Generation number at time of emission.

prefix.description: Kernel namespace this island belongs to (e.g. 'tsp', 'sdf', 'noise').

island_id.description: Zero-based index of the island within the run.

best_fitness.description: Best fitness score in this island's population this generation.

plateau_count.description: Number of consecutive generations without improvement in best_fitness for this island.

population_size.description: Number of live programs in this island's population.

age_since_last_reset.description: Generations elapsed since this island was last reset. 0 means it was reset this generation.

timestamp.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when this health snapshot was taken.
